default_summary.markdown_formatted:
### [Coinbase incident and asset management @ 0:00](https://fathom.video/share/oNH3CbdD7w3P6kh9F4HwqqJguB_DpJxd?tab=summary&timestamp=0)

Luca discussed an incident at Coinbase where they updated the precision of cryptocurrency assets live, without following their standard procedure of halting trading first. This led to a period of inconsistent pricing and Coinbase giving away assets for free, nearly exceeding their capitalization. Luca explained how Coinbase has since invested heavily in tooling and processes to prevent such incidents from recurring, including automating trading halts for configuration changes.

### [Rapid advancements in coding AI @ 10:44](https://fathom.video/share/oNH3CbdD7w3P6kh9F4HwqqJguB_DpJxd?tab=summary&timestamp=644)

Luca described how recent AI models like Anthropic's Opus 4.6 have made major breakthroughs in their ability to tackle large, complex coding tasks. He discussed Checkr's "Project Edge" initiative to build a fleet of AI coding agents that can autonomously take on engineering work like bug fixes, migrations, and refactoring - freeing up human engineers to focus on more strategic initiatives.

### [Concerns around AI-generated deepfakes @ 35:14](https://fathom.video/share/oNH3CbdD7w3P6kh9F4HwqqJguB_DpJxd?tab=summary&timestamp=2114)

Luca acknowledged the threat of deepfakes, noting that while background checks can validate the authenticity of information, the challenge is ensuring the person presenting themselves matches the verified identity, especially for remote work. He discussed potential biometric solutions but noted they remain intrusive and vulnerable.

### [Checkr's approach to innovation and new products @ 49:25](https://fathom.video/share/oNH3CbdD7w3P6kh9F4HwqqJguB_DpJxd?tab=summary&timestamp=2965)

Luca explained Checkr's "Checkr X" model, where they segregate new business bets and innovations from the core business. These ventures operate semi-independently with their own funding and leadership, allowing them to rapidly experiment and scale without being constrained by the core business. This has enabled Checkr to launch multiple new products in the past year.

### [Checkr's executive team practices @ 52:02](https://fathom.video/share/oNH3CbdD7w3P6kh9F4HwqqJguB_DpJxd?tab=summary&timestamp=3122)

Luca described Checkr's daily executive stand-up meetings, where the leadership team discusses both personal and business updates. He noted this has fostered an exceptionally cohesive and aligned executive team, helping to avoid politics and quickly address any issues that arise.
